caption: In a spacious, indoor ballroom with recessed ceiling lighting and ornate chandeliers, a group of people dressed in traditional Asian-style attire are gathered. Several individuals wear blue tunics and trousers, while others are in white or black. Initially, the group stands relatively still, with a man in white clothing positioned centrally in the foreground. As the scene progresses, the people transition from standing to active movement. The man in white begins to move dynamically, shifting his weight and stepping forward. Simultaneously, the individuals in blue also begin to engage in coordinated, rhythmic movements, stepping and gesturing in unison. The background reveals a seated audience watching the performance. The composition shifts from a static line of participants to a more fluid and energetic scene of choreographed movement across the blue-carpeted floor.
